hooks.command: cd /c/Users/207ds/Desktop/Apps/refactor-companion/capture-hub-project && file="${file}" && if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs)$'; then npx eslint --max-warnings=0 "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

if echo "${file}" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\.local|\.env\.production)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Direct edits to .env files are not allowed. Update .env.example or .env.production.template instead.' && exit 2; fi
